NAME: Dedy Rahmat
TITLE: Frontend & Mobile Developer
SUBTITLE: Bound by the Golden Code to manifest seamless visions across the Web and Mobile planes. Vanquisher of lag, Forger of stability.
ABOUT_ME:
Hey! I'm Dera, a developer who's been building apps for over 7 years now. I mainly work with React Native and React, creating mobile and web apps that people actually enjoy using.

Right now, I'm at WEEKEND Inc. working on mobile apps – making sure they run smoothly and don't make users want to throw their phones across the room. Before this, I've bounced around different projects in e-commerce, fintech, and some enterprise stuff, which has been a pretty cool ride.

When I'm not coding, I'm probably gaming on my PC or PS5, endlessly scrolling through social media, binging YouTube videos, or watching movies – whatever kills the boredom that day, really.
